title: Aging Associations - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Aging Associations 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON ASSOCIATION OF AREA AGENCIES ON AGING AND DISABILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Association of Area Agencies on Aging and Disabilities (O4AD) is comprised of the 18 Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) located throughout Oregon. O4AD does not provide direct services to the public, but advocates for programs, services, funding, and strategies to serve older adults and people with disabilities. Community services funded by the Older Americans Act and home and community based services, such as Oregon Project Independence, are managed by local AAAs. AAAs provide case management for older adults and/or people with disabilities who are Medicaid clients in most urban areas of the state. Remaining areas are covered by Oregon Department of Human Services (ODHS) staff. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 463-8692 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
